initial_diagnostic_question.question: Does this ECG suggest the presence of premature ventricular complexes?

criterion_selection.question: To accurately diagnose premature ventricular complexes, which of the following diagnostic criteria should be evaluated?
options: Presence of intermittent ventricular pauses (dropped beats)
Presence of a consistently regular RR interval
Presence of grouped beating patterns separated by pauses

finding.question: Regarding the criterion you selected, are there any premature beats on this ECG, where a QRS complex occurs earlier than expected time based on the preceding normal cycles?

decision.question: Based on the finding identified above, does this patient have premature ventricular complex(es)?
options: Further findings are required to confirm the diagnosis
